sEn: MiniMax Sparse Attention achieves 28.4x compute reduction and 14.2x prefill speedup at 1M context with a 109B multimodal model.
sZh: MiniMax 稀疏注意力在 109B 多模态模型上实现 1M 上下文时 28.4 倍计算缩减和 14.2 倍预填充加速。
absEn: Ultra-long-context capability is becoming indispensable for frontier LLMs: agentic workflows, repository-scale code reasoning, and persistent memory all require the model to jointly attend over hundreds of thousands to millions of tokens, yet the quadratic cost of softmax attention makes this untenable at deployment scale. We introduce MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA), a blockwise sparse attention built upon Grouped Query Attention (GQA). A lightweight Index Branch scores key-value blocks and independently selects a Top-k subset for each GQA group, enabling group-specific sparse retrieval while maintaining efficient block-level execution; the Main Branch then performs exact block-sparse attention over only the selected blocks. Designed around a principle of simplicity and scalability, MSA is deliberately streamlined, making it straightforward to deploy efficiently across a broad range of GPUs. To translate sparsity into practical speedups, we co-design MSA with a GPU execution path that uses exp-free Top-k selection and KV-outer sparse attention to improve tensor-core utilization under block-granular access. On a 109B-parameter model with native multimodal training, MSA performs on par with GQA while reducing per-token attention compute by 28.4x at 1M context. Paired with our co-designed kernel, MSA achieves 14.2x prefill and 7.6x decoding wall-clock speedups on H800. Our inference kernel is available at: https://github.com/MiniMax-AI/MSA. A production-grade natively multimodal model powered by MSA has been publicly released at: https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M3.
absZh: 超长上下文能力对于前沿大语言模型变得不可或缺：智能体工作流、仓库级代码推理和持久记忆都需要模型共同关注数十万到数百万个 token，但 softmax 注意力的二次成本使得这在部署规模上难以实现。我们提出了 MiniMax 稀疏注意力（MSA），一种基于分组查询注意力（GQA）的块级稀疏注意力。轻量级索引分支对键值块进行评分，并为每个 GQA 组独立选择 Top-k 子集，实现组特定的稀疏检索，同时保持高效的块级执行；主分支则仅对所选块执行精确的块稀疏注意力。MSA 的设计遵循简单和可扩展的原则，经过精心简化，使其能够在广泛的 GPU 上高效部署。为了将稀疏性转化为实际加速，我们与 MSA 共同设计了 GPU 执行路径，使用无指数 Top-k 选择和 KV 外部稀疏注意力来改善块粒度访问下的张量核心利用率。在具有原生多模态训练的 109B 参数模型上，MSA 的性能与 GQA 相当，同时在 1M 上下文下将每个 token 的注意力计算减少了 28.4 倍。结合我们共同设计的内核，MSA 在 H800 上实现了 14.2 倍的预填充和 7.6 倍的解码墙钟加速。我们的推理内核可在 https://github.com/MiniMax-AI/MSA 获取。由 MSA 驱动的生产级原生多模态模型已在 https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M3 公开发布。

contrib.en: Introduces MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA), a blockwise sparse attention built upon Grouped Query Attention (GQA).
contrib.zh: 提出MiniMax稀疏注意力（MSA），一种基于分组查询注意力（GQA）的块级稀疏注意力机制。

contrib.en: Designs a lightweight Index Branch that independently selects Top-k key-value blocks per GQA group.
contrib.zh: 设计轻量级索引分支，为每个GQA组独立选择Top-k键值块。

contrib.en: Co-designs GPU kernels with exp-free Top-k selection and KV-outer sparse attention for practical speedups.
contrib.zh: 协同设计GPU内核，采用无指数Top-k选择和KV外循环稀疏注意力实现实际加速。

contrib.en: Demonstrates 28.4x attention compute reduction and 14.2x prefill speedup on a 109B-parameter model at 1M context.
contrib.zh: 在109B参数模型上，1M上下文下实现28.4倍注意力计算减少和14.2倍预填充加速。

contrib.en: Validates MSA matches GQA on downstream benchmarks while enabling efficient long-context inference.
contrib.zh: 验证MSA在下游基准测试中与GQA性能相当，同时实现高效长上下文推理。

contrib.en: Releases production-grade multimodal model and inference kernel publicly.
contrib.zh: 公开发布生产级多模态模型和推理内核。

limits.en: Sparse attention budget fixed at 2,048 tokens per query, limiting recall for very long contexts.
limits.zh: 稀疏注意力预算固定为每查询2048个token，限制了极长上下文中的召回率。

limits.en: Requires two-stage warmup training for indexer, adding complexity to training pipeline.
limits.zh: 需要两阶段预热训练索引器，增加了训练流程的复杂性。

limits.en: Runtime speedup smaller than theoretical FLOP reduction due to kernel overheads.
limits.zh: 由于内核开销，运行时加速小于理论FLOP减少。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to 109B MoE model; generalization to other architectures not fully explored.
limits.zh: 评估限于109B MoE模型，未充分探索对其他架构的泛化性。

limits.en: Indexer trained with KL loss may not capture all attention patterns, especially for rare tokens.
limits.zh: 基于KL损失的索引器训练可能无法捕获所有注意力模式，尤其是对罕见token。

items.en: Ultra-long-context capability is becoming indispensable for frontier LLMs: agentic workflows, repository-scale code reasoning, and persistent memory all require the model to jointly attend over hundreds of thousands to millions of tokens—yet the quadratic cost of softmax attention makes this untenable at deployment scale. We introduce MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA), a blockwise sparse attention built upon Grouped Query Attention (GQA). A lightweight Index Branch scores key–value blocks and independently selects a Top-kk subset for each GQA group, enabling group-specific sparse retrieval while maintaining efficient block-level execution; the Main Branch then performs exact block-sparse attention over only the selected blocks. Designed around a principle of simplicity and scalability, MSA is deliberately streamlined, making it straightforward to deploy efficiently across a broad range of GPUs. To translate sparsity into practical speedups, we co-design MSA with a GPU execution path that uses exp-free Top-kk selection and KV-outer sparse attention to improve tensor-core utilization under block-granular access. On a 109B-parameter model with native multimodal training, MSA performs on par with GQA while reducing per-token attention compute by 28.4×28.4\times at 1M context. Paired with our co-designed kernel, MSA achieves 14.2×14.2\times prefill and 7.6×7.6\times decoding wall-clock speedups on H800. Our inference kernel is available at: https://github.com/MiniMax-AI/MSA. A production-grade natively multimodal model powered by MSA has been publicly released at: https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M3.
items.zh: 超长上下文能力正成为前沿大语言模型不可或缺的能力：智能体式工作流、仓库级代码推理和持久记忆都要求模型共同关注数十万到数百万个词元——然而，softmax注意力机制的二次方成本使得这在部署规模上难以实现。我们提出了MiniMax稀疏注意力（MSA），一种基于分组查询注意力（GQA）的块状稀疏注意力机制。一个轻量级的索引分支对键值块进行评分，并为每个GQA组独立选择Top-k子集，从而实现组特定的稀疏检索，同时保持高效的块级执行；主分支则仅对所选块执行精确的块稀疏注意力。MSA的设计遵循简洁和可扩展的原则，刻意精简，使其易于在广泛的GPU上高效部署。为了将稀疏性转化为实际的速度提升，我们将MSA与GPU执行路径协同设计，该路径使用无exp的Top-k选择和KV外稀疏注意力，以在块粒度访问下提高张量核心利用率。在一个具有原生多模态训练的109B参数模型上，MSA在1M上下文下与GQA性能相当，同时将每个词元的注意力计算量减少了28.4倍。结合我们协同设计的内核，MSA在H800上实现了14.2倍的预填充和7.6倍解码的端到端加速。我们的推理内核可在https://github.com/MiniMax-AI/MSA获取。一个由MSA驱动的生产级原生多模态模型已在https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M3公开发布。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Overview of MSA. The Index Branch (left) scores the full causal context with a single lightweight head and selects, for each query and GQA group, a set ℐ{\mathcal{I}} of kk key blocks; the local block is always included regardless of its score. The Main Branch (right) attends only to the selected blocks and produces the layer output. During training, a KL loss aligns the index distribution with the group-averaged Main Branch distribution on the selected blocks, and the Index Branch gradient is detached from the Main Branch.
items.capZh: 图1：MSA概述。索引分支（左）使用单个轻量级头对整个因果上下文进行评分，并为每个查询和GQA组选择一组k个键块；无论其得分如何，本地块始终被包含。主分支（右）仅关注所选块并生成层输出。在训练期间，KL损失使索引分布与所选块上的组平均主分支分布对齐，并且索引分支梯度与主分支分离。

items.en: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly shifting from short, single-turn interactions to long-horizon agentic workflows that span hundreds of interleaved reasoning and action steps—writing and deploying production code, navigating the open web, orchestrating diverse tools, and producing structured documents (40; 2; 18; 15; 38; 69). However, the ultra-long contexts these tasks demand impose severe compute and memory bottlenecks on both training and inference, with quadratic-cost softmax attention being the primary culprit, further amplified by the latency and throughput constraints of production-scale deployment.
items.zh: 大语言模型正迅速从短的单轮交互转向长程智能体式工作流，这些工作流包含数百个交织的推理和行动步骤——编写和部署生产代码、浏览开放网络、编排各种工具以及生成结构化文档（40; 2; 18; 15; 38; 69）。然而，这些任务所需的超长上下文在训练和推理中引入了严重的计算和内存瓶颈，其中二次方成本的softmax注意力是主要原因，而生产规模部署的延迟和吞吐量约束进一步加剧了这一问题。

items.en: Context length is a critical scaling dimension for LLMs, where trading off model quality against efficiency remains a formidable challenge. The community is actively pushing the Pareto frontier on this front. Hybrid architectures (37; 42) replace a subset of softmax attention layers with efficient alternatives such as linear attention (49; 61; 19) or sliding window attention (39; 35). Alternatively, another line of work attempts to sparsify softmax attention (14; 15; 50; 31) itself to break the computational bottleneck.
items.zh: 上下文长度是大语言模型的一个关键缩放维度，在模型质量和效率之间进行权衡仍然是一个艰巨的挑战。社区正在积极推动这一前沿的帕累托边界。混合架构（37; 42）用高效替代方案（如线性注意力（49; 61; 19）或滑动窗口注意力（39; 35））替换部分softmax注意力层。另一种研究方向试图稀疏化softmax注意力（14; 15; 50; 31）本身，以打破计算瓶颈。

items.en: We introduce MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA), designed following Occam’s razor: after extensive ablation, we retain only the essential components. MSA follows the sparse softmax attention paradigm to maximally reuse existing software and hardware infrastructure. We adopt blockwise token selection with a smaller top-kk, enabling efficient execution across a wider range of GPU architectures while relaxing the head-dimension constraints imposed by prior designs. Concretely, an ultra-lightweight Index Branch selects, for each attention group, the top-kk blocks via max-pooling scoring, while always retaining the most recent block to ensure training stability.
items.zh: 我们提出了MiniMax稀疏注意力（MSA），其设计遵循奥卡姆剃刀原则：经过大量消融实验，我们仅保留必要组件。MSA遵循稀疏softmax注意力范式，以最大化重用现有软件和硬件基础设施。我们采用块级词元选择，使用较小的top-k，从而在更广泛的GPU架构上实现高效执行，同时放宽了先前设计施加的头维度约束。具体而言，一个超轻量级的索引分支通过最大池化评分为每个注意力组选择top-k块，同时始终保留最近块以确保训练稳定性。

items.en: Turning MSA’s theoretical sparsity into practical end-to-end speedups requires co-designing the algorithm with its GPU execution path. To this end, we design an exp-free TopK kernel specialized for the small-k regime, leveraging the blockwise indexer to bypass unnecessary softmax computation before selection. For the main attention branch, we organize sparse attention in a KV-outer order: selected KV blocks gather their associated queries and concatenate them to fill tensor-core MMAs, using pre-scheduled chunking with a two-phase combine to handle highly skewed block popularity without atomic updates. For training, we further fuse the auxiliary LSE computation required by the sparse KL loss into the forward pass and employ persistent load balancing in the backward pass.
items.zh: 将MSA的理论稀疏性转化为实际的端到端加速需要将算法与其GPU执行路径协同设计。为此，我们设计了一个专门针对小k场景的无exp TopK内核，利用块级索引器在选择之前绕过不必要的softmax计算。对于主注意力分支，我们以KV外顺序组织稀疏注意力：选定的KV块收集其关联的查询并拼接以填充张量核心矩阵乘法，使用预调度的分块和两阶段组合来处理高度倾斜的块流行度，无需原子更新。对于训练，我们进一步将稀疏KL损失所需的辅助LSE计算融合到前向传播中，并在反向传播中采用持久负载均衡。

items.en: To validate that MSA preserves both textual and multimodal capabilities, we compare it against Grouped Query Attention on a 109B-parameter Mixture of Experts (MoE) model trained from scratch with a 3T-token budget. MSA matches GQA on downstream benchmarks while delivering 14.2×14.2\times prefill and 7.6×7.6\times decoding speedups at 1M context length.
items.zh: 为了验证MSA保留了文本和多模态能力，我们将其与分组查询注意力在一个从头开始训练、预算为3T词元的109B参数混合专家（MoE）模型上进行了比较。MSA在下游基准测试中与GQA相当，同时在1M上下文长度下实现了14.2倍的预填充和7.6倍的解码加速。

items.en: We propose MSA, a minimal, scalable, and accelerated blockwise sparse attention mechanism that supports both training from scratch and near-lossless conversion from pretrained GQA checkpoints.
items.zh: 我们提出了MSA，一种最小化、可扩展且加速的块状稀疏注意力机制，支持从头训练和从预训练GQA检查点进行近乎无损的转换。

items.en: We co-design efficient training and inference kernels that turn MSA’s theoretical compute savings into real wall-clock speedups at scale.
items.zh: 我们协同设计了高效的训练和推理内核，将MSA的理论计算节省转化为实际的大规模端到端加速。

items.en: We perform extensive ablations scaling up to a 109B-parameter MoE model with native multimodal training, dissecting MSA’s behavior across scales and modalities.
items.zh: 我们进行了广泛的消融实验，扩展到具有原生多模态训练的109B参数MoE模型，剖析了MSA在不同规模和模态下的行为。

items.en: We introduce MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA), a GQA-based sparse attention mechanism with two branches, as illustrated in Figure 1. For each query token, a lightweight Index Branch selects a small set of key blocks from the causal context, and the Main Branch computes softmax attention over the tokens in those blocks. The Index Branch adds only two projection matrices to standard GQA, operates at block granularity, and makes selections independently for each GQA group. We describe the architecture in Section 3.1 and the training procedure in Section 3.2.
items.zh: 我们介绍了MiniMax稀疏注意力（MSA），一种基于GQA的稀疏注意力机制，具有两个分支，如图1所示。对于每个查询词元，一个轻量级的索引分支从因果上下文中选择一小部分键块，主分支计算这些块中词元上的softmax注意力。索引分支仅向标准GQA添加两个投影矩阵，以块粒度操作，并为每个GQA组独立进行选择。我们在第3.1节描述架构，在第3.2节描述训练过程。

items.en: Given the block index set ℐi(r){\mathcal{I}}_{i}^{(r)} selected by the Index Branch, the Main Branch attends only to the causally visible tokens in the selected blocks. For any query head h∈ℋrh\in\mathcal{H}_{r}, it applies standard scaled dot-product attention restricted to these tokens, using the key-value head associated with GQA group rr:
items.zh: 给定索引分支选择的块索引集 ℐi(r){\mathcal{I}}_{i}^{(r)}，主分支仅关注所选块中因果可见的词元。对于任何查询头 h∈ℋrh\in\mathcal{H}_{r}，它应用标准的缩放点积注意力，限制在这些词元上，使用与 GQA 组 rr 关联的键值头：

items.en: where 𝑸i(h){\bm{Q}}_{i}^{(h)} denotes the query vector at position ii and query head hh, while 𝑲(r){\bm{K}}^{(r)} and 𝑽(r){\bm{V}}^{(r)} denote the key and value matrices of the rr-th GQA group. The notation 𝑲(r)​[ℐi(r)]{\bm{K}}^{(r)}[{\mathcal{I}}_{i}^{(r)}] and 𝑽(r)​[ℐi(r)]{\bm{V}}^{(r)}[{\mathcal{I}}_{i}^{(r)}] denotes gathering the causally visible tokens from the selected blocks. The block index set ℐi(r){\mathcal{I}}_{i}^{(r)} is shared by all query heads in ℋr\mathcal{H}_{r}, while each head keeps its own query projection. Since the selected blocks contain at most k​BkkB_{k} causally visible tokens, the per-query attention cost is reduced from O⁡(N)O(N) to O⁡(k​Bk)O(kB_{k}), which is fixed as the sequence length increases.
items.zh: 其中 𝑸i(h){\bm{Q}}_{i}^{(h)} 表示位置 ii 和查询头 hh 处的查询向量，而 𝑲(r){\bm{K}}^{(r)} 和 𝑽(r){\bm{V}}^{(r)} 表示第 rr 个 GQA 组的键和值矩阵。符号 𝑲(r)​[ℐi(r)]{\bm{K}}^{(r)}[{\mathcal{I}}_{i}^{(r)}] 和 𝑽(r)​[ℐi(r)]{\bm{V}}^{(r)}[{\mathcal{I}}_{i}^{(r)}] 表示从所选块中收集因果可见的词元。块索引集 ℐi(r){\mathcal{I}}_{i}^{(r)} 由 ℋr\mathcal{H}_{r} 中的所有查询头共享，而每个头保留自己的查询投影。由于所选块最多包含 k​BkkB_{k} 个因果可见词元，每个查询的注意力成本从 O⁡(N)O(N) 降低到 O⁡(k​Bk)O(kB_{k})，随着序列长度增加而固定。

items.en: The top-kk selection in Equation 7 is non-differentiable, so the language-modeling loss cannot train the index Q/KQ/K projections 𝑾qidx,𝑾kidx{\bm{W}}^{\rm idx}_{q},{\bm{W}}^{\rm idx}_{k} directly. We therefore train the Index Branch with a KL alignment loss and use three mechanisms to stabilise sparse training: Gradient Detach, Indexer Warmup, and a forced Local Block. We describe each component below.
items.zh: 公式 7 中的 top-kk 选择是不可微的，因此语言建模损失无法直接训练索引 Q/KQ/K 投影 𝑾qidx,𝑾kidx{\bm{W}}^{\rm idx}_{q},{\bm{W}}^{\rm idx}_{k}。因此，我们使用 KL 对齐损失训练索引分支，并使用三种机制来稳定稀疏训练：梯度分离、索引器预热和强制局部块。下面描述每个组件。

items.en: The KL loss gives the Index Branch a direct learning signal by matching its scores to the Main Branch on the selected tokens. Writing ℐi,tok(r)=(⋃b∈ℐi(r)ℬb)∩{1,…,i}{\mathcal{I}}_{i,\mathrm{tok}}^{(r)}=(\bigcup_{b\in{\mathcal{I}}_{i}^{(r)}}{\mathcal{B}}_{b})\cap\{1,\dots,i\} for the causally visible tokens induced by the selected block indices, for each query position ii and GQA group rr, we define the Index Branch distribution PidxP^{\rm idx} and the Main Branch teacher PP over this token index set:
items.zh: KL 损失通过将索引分支的分数与主分支在所选词元上的分数匹配，为索引分支提供直接的学习信号。令 ℐi,tok(r)=(⋃b∈ℐi(r)ℬb)∩{1,…,i}{\mathcal{I}}_{i,\mathrm{tok}}^{(r)}=(\bigcup_{b\in{\mathcal{I}}_{i}^{(r)}}{\mathcal{B}}_{b})\cap\{1,\dots,i\} 为由所选块索引引起的因果可见词元集，对于每个查询位置 ii 和 GQA 组 rr，我们在此词元索引集上定义索引分支分布 PidxP^{\rm idx} 和主分支教师 PP：

items.en: where Si,jidx,(r)=(𝑸idx)i(r)​(𝑲idx)j⊤/didxS^{{\rm idx},(r)}_{i,j}=({\bm{Q}}^{\rm idx})^{(r)}_{i}({\bm{K}}^{\rm idx})_{j}^{\top}/\sqrt{d_{\rm idx}} is the token-level index score, and Si,j(ℓ)=𝑸i(ℓ)​(𝑲j(r))⊤/dhS^{(\ell)}_{i,j}={\bm{Q}}^{(\ell)}_{i}({\bm{K}}^{(r)}_{j})^{\top}/\sqrt{d_{h}} is the Main Branch score for query head ℓ∈ℋr\ell\in\mathcal{H}_{r}. The teacher PP averages the per-head Main Branch distributions at the probability level. The indexer is then trained to match PP, averaged over all query positions and GQA groups:
items.zh: 其中 Si,jidx,(r)=(𝑸idx)i(r)​(𝑲idx)j⊤/didxS^{{\rm idx},(r)}_{i,j}=({\bm{Q}}^{\rm idx})^{(r)}_{i}({\bm{K}}^{\rm idx})_{j}^{\top}/\sqrt{d_{\rm idx}} 是词元级索引分数，Si,j(ℓ)=𝑸i(ℓ)​(𝑲j(r))⊤/dhS^{(\ell)}_{i,j}={\bm{Q}}^{(\ell)}_{i}({\bm{K}}^{(r)}_{j})^{\top}/\sqrt{d_{h}} 是查询头 ℓ∈ℋr\ell\in\mathcal{H}_{r} 的主分支分数。教师 PP 在概率级别上平均每个头的主分支分布。然后训练索引器以匹配 PP，对所有查询位置和 GQA 组取平均：

items.en: where NN is the sequence length, and the teacher distribution Pi,⋅(r)P^{(r)}_{i,\cdot} is detached from gradient computation. This auxiliary loss aligns the index distribution with the Main Branch attention pattern, making the subsequent block selection semantically meaningful.
items.zh: 其中 NN 是序列长度，教师分布 Pi,⋅(r)P^{(r)}_{i,\cdot} 从梯度计算中分离。这个辅助损失将索引分布与主分支注意力模式对齐，使后续的块选择具有语义意义。

items.en: To isolate the auxiliary objective from the backbone, we apply stop-gradient to the Index Branch input:
items.zh: 为了将辅助目标与主干隔离，我们对索引分支输入应用停止梯度：

items.en: The teacher PP in Equation 9 is detached, so ℒKL\mathcal{L}_{\rm KL} leaves the Main Branch projections untouched; Equation 11 further prevents it from reaching the backbone through 𝑿{\bm{X}}. Under this rule, ℒKL\mathcal{L}_{\rm KL} updates only 𝑾qidx{\bm{W}}^{\rm idx}_{q} and 𝑾kidx{\bm{W}}^{\rm idx}_{k}, making the KL a clean alignment signal for the indexer.
items.zh: 公式 9 中的教师 PP 是分离的，因此 ℒKL\mathcal{L}_{\rm KL} 不触及主分支投影；公式 11 进一步阻止它通过 𝑿{\bm{X}} 到达主干。在此规则下，ℒKL\mathcal{L}_{\rm KL} 仅更新 𝑾qidx{\bm{W}}^{\rm idx}_{q} 和 𝑾kidx{\bm{W}}^{\rm idx}_{k}，使 KL 成为索引器的干净对齐信号。

items.en: We use a two-stage training schedule to initialise the Index Branch and avoid early random selections. During the first few iterations, the model runs full attention in both branches and trains the newly added index projections with ℒKL\mathcal{L}_{\rm KL}. After warmup, the model switches to sparse attention, and ℒKL\mathcal{L}_{\rm KL} is computed over the top-kk selected positions. The same schedule is used when sparsifying a pretrained full-attention checkpoint, which helps align the newly added index projections before they control Main Branch routing.
items.zh: 我们使用两阶段训练计划来初始化索引分支并避免早期随机选择。在前几次迭代中，模型在两个分支中运行完全注意力，并使用 ℒKL\mathcal{L}_{\rm KL} 训练新添加的索引投影。预热后，模型切换到稀疏注意力，并且 ℒKL\mathcal{L}_{\rm KL} 在 top-kk 选定位置上计算。在稀疏化预训练的完全注意力检查点时使用相同的计划，这有助于在索引投影控制主分支路由之前对齐它们。

items.en: For each query position ii and GQA group rr, the local block containing ii is always selected as part of ℐi(r){\mathcal{I}}_{i}^{(r)} during both training and inference. This fixed allocation reserves one block slot and leaves the remaining slots to be chosen by the Index Branch, preventing degenerate selections that omit the query’s immediate neighbourhood.
items.zh: 对于每个查询位置 ii 和 GQA 组 rr，包含 ii 的局部块在训练和推理期间始终被选为 ℐi(r){\mathcal{I}}_{i}^{(r)} 的一部分。这个固定分配保留了一个块槽，并将剩余槽留给索引分支选择，防止忽略查询直接邻域的退化选择。

items.en: The complete layer-level training procedure is summarised in Algorithm 1.
items.zh: 完整的层级训练过程总结在算法 1 中。

items.en: GQA scales its main attention path with the full context length, whereas MSA uses a fixed selection budget k​BkkB_{k} plus a lightweight index computation; the FLOPs gap therefore grows with NN when k​Bk≪NkB_{k}\ll N and Hk​v​didx≪Hq​dhH_{kv}d_{\rm idx}\ll H_{q}d_{h}.
items.zh: GQA 将其主要注意力路径扩展到完整上下文长度，而 MSA 使用固定的选择预算 k​BkkB_{k} 加上轻量级的索引计算；因此，当 k​Bk≪NkB_{k}\ll N 且 Hk​v​didx≪Hq​dhH_{kv}d_{\rm idx}\ll H_{q}d_{h} 时，FLOPs 差距随 NN 增长。

items.en: This section describes the GPU kernels used in our sparse prefill implementation, including the index TopK kernel, the KV-outer sparse attention forward, and the sparse KL loss backward.
items.zh: 本节描述了我们稀疏预填充实现中使用的 GPU 内核，包括索引 TopK 内核、KV-外部稀疏注意力前向和稀疏 KL 损失反向。

items.en: To efficiently select the top-kk KV blocks, the index module ranks the index scores ss directly. Since softmax is order-preserving, the relative ordering of scores is preserved (si≤sj⇔softmax​(s)i≤softmax​(s)js_{i}\leq s_{j}\iff\mathrm{softmax}(s)_{i}\leq\mathrm{softmax}(s)_{j}), leaving the top-kk indices unchanged. The forward pass, therefore, bypasses the max/exp/sum steps of softmax and passes raw scores directly to selection.
items.zh: 为了高效选择 top-kk KV 块，索引模块直接对索引分数 ss 进行排序。由于 softmax 保持顺序，分数的相对顺序得以保留（si≤sj⇔softmax​(s)i≤softmax​(s)js_{i}\leq s_{j}\iff\mathrm{softmax}(s)_{i}\leq\mathrm{softmax}(s)_{j}），因此 top-kk 索引保持不变。因此，前向传播绕过 softmax 的 max/exp/sum 步骤，直接将原始分数传递给选择。

items.en: The block size BkB_{k} and selection size kk are co-designed with the top-kk kernel: a large BkB_{k} increases attention arithmetic intensity (Section 4.2), and a small kk at this BkB_{k} keeps both the per-row candidate block count BB and kk below the sweet spot of general-purpose top-kk kernels, which amortize multi-pass bucketing over large BB (radix selection) or scale as O⁡(B​log2​B)O(B\log^{2}B) (bitonic sort). We adopt Bk=128B_{k}=128, k=16k=16. Each of the warp’s 32 lanes streams a 1/32 stride of the input row and maintains a kk-element min-heap in shared memory. The heap root is cached in a register, and insertions are performed with deferred writes. Finally, a kk-round shuffle merge combines the 32 local TopK results. The shared-memory layout maps each lane to a fixed bank, avoiding conflicts.
items.zh: 块大小 BkB_{k} 和选择大小 kk 与 top-kk 内核共同设计：较大的 BkB_{k} 增加注意力算术强度（第 4.2 节），在此 BkB_{k} 下较小的 kk 使每行候选块数 BB 和 kk 保持在通用 top-kk 内核的最佳点以下，这些内核通过多遍分桶（基数选择）或 O⁡(B​log2​B)O(B\log^{2}B)（双调排序）来分摊大 BB。我们采用 Bk=128B_{k}=128，k=16k=16。每个 warp 的 32 个线程以 1/32 的步幅流式传输输入行，并在共享内存中维护一个 kk 元素的最小堆。堆根缓存在寄存器中，插入操作使用延迟写入。最后，一轮 kk 轮次洗牌合并组合 32 个局部 TopK 结果。共享内存布局将每个线程映射到固定存储体，避免冲突。

items.en: We compare against torch.topk and the TileLang (52) radix-select top-kk on an H800 GPU with fp32 inputs and unsorted outputs; latencies are the median of 5050 post-warmup iterations. Table 1 shows that our specialized kernel is fastest in all tested settings, with the largest gains at the deployed setting k=16k=16.
items.zh: 我们在 H800 GPU 上使用 fp32 输入和未排序输出，与 torch.topk 和 TileLang (52) 基数选择 top-kk 进行比较；延迟是 5050 次预热后迭代的中位数。表 1 显示，我们的专用内核在所有测试设置中速度最快，在部署设置 k=16k=16 下增益最大。

items.en: We revisit the choice of iteration order under sparse prefill with equal query and key/value lengths. Let HqH_{q}, Hk​vH_{kv}, G=Hq/Hk​vG=H_{q}/H_{kv}, dhd_{h}, NN, BkB_{k}, and kk denote the number of query heads, key-value heads, GQA ratio, head dimension, sequence length, KV block size, and number of blocks selected per query. For simplicity, the IO estimates below assume 2-byte elements (bfloat16-sized traffic). Our kernels also support fp8; using fp8 rescales the absolute IO volume but leaves the comparison between Q-outer and KV-outer iteration unchanged.
items.zh: 我们重新审视在稀疏预填充（sparse prefill）且查询与键/值长度相等的情况下迭代顺序的选择。设 HqH_{q}、HkvH_{kv}、G=Hq/HkvG=H_{q}/H_{kv}、dhd_{h}、NN、BkB_{k} 和 kk 分别表示查询头数、键值头数、GQA 比率、头维度、序列长度、KV 块大小和每个查询选择的块数。为简化，以下 IO 估计假设 2 字节元素（bfloat16 大小的流量）。我们的内核也支持 fp8；使用 fp8 会重新缩放绝对 IO 量，但不会改变 Q-outer 与 KV-outer 迭代之间的比较。

items.zh: 因此 FLOPs/IO≈G\mathrm{FLOPs}/\mathrm{IO}\approx G。

items.en: Iterating KV blocks on the outer loop and gathering the queries that selected each block requires an intermediate output buffer:
items.zh: 在外层循环迭代 KV 块并收集选择每个块的查询需要一个中间输出缓冲区：

items.en: hence FLOPs/IO≈23​Bk\mathrm{FLOPs}/\mathrm{IO}\approx\tfrac{2}{3}B_{k}.
items.zh: 因此 FLOPs/IO≈23Bk\mathrm{FLOPs}/\mathrm{IO}\approx\tfrac{2}{3}B_{k}。

items.en: Since 23​Bk≫G\tfrac{2}{3}B_{k}\gg G in practice, we choose KV-outer iteration with Q gather to maximize arithmetic intensity. The kernel executes as a persistent grid over (kv_block,kv_head)(\textit{kv\_block},\textit{kv\_head}) tiles. For each tile, a reverse sparse index from the TopK selection identifies the relevant query positions. These queries are loaded into shared memory via TMA copies, one per query token, dispatched in parallel by the 32 lanes of a warp.
items.zh: 由于实际中 23Bk≫G\tfrac{2}{3}B_{k}\gg G，我们选择 KV-outer 迭代配合 Q gather 以最大化算术强度。内核作为持久化网格在 (kv_block,kv_head)(\textit{kv\_block},\textit{kv\_head}) 瓦片上执行。对于每个瓦片，来自 TopK 选择的反向稀疏索引标识相关的查询位置。这些查询通过 TMA 拷贝加载到共享内存中，每个查询 token 一个，由 warp 的 32 条通道并行分发。

items.en: A direct one-CTA-per-tile mapping is dominated by sink rows—a single early KV block selected by nearly every query—and the same hotspot pattern can arise on any popular KV block. A GPU scheduler kernel therefore splits each KV tile along its query dimension into chunks of at most ∼2​k​Bk\sim\!2kB_{k} queries each, fanning hot tiles across many CTAs that share the same 𝐊/𝐕\mathbf{K}/\mathbf{V} load. Because each query’s kk partials are now produced by kk CTAs, the scheduler also preassigns each (query, chunk) pair a slot s∈[0,k)s\in[0,k) in 𝐎buf\mathbf{O}_{\text{buf}}—packed with the query index ii into a 3232-bit handle—so the attention kernel writes its partial to the preassigned offset without atomics. The combine kernel reads a per-query slot count to know how many partials to merge.
items.zh: 直接的每 CTA 每瓦片映射受 sink 行主导——单个早期 KV 块被几乎所有查询选择——且相同的热点模式可能出现在任何流行 KV 块上。因此，GPU 调度器内核沿查询维度将每个 KV 瓦片分割成最多 ∼2kBk\sim\!2kB_{k} 个查询的块，将热点瓦片分散到共享相同 K/V\mathbf{K}/\mathbf{V} 加载的多个 CTA 上。由于每个查询的 kk 个部分现在由 kk 个 CTA 产生，调度器还预先为每个 (query, chunk) 对分配 Obuf\mathbf{O}_{\text{buf}} 中的一个槽 s∈[0,k)s\in[0,k)——与查询索引 ii 打包成一个 32 位句柄——因此注意力内核无需原子操作即可写入预分配的偏移量。合并内核读取每个查询的槽计数以了解需要合并多少个部分。

items.en: The KV-outer split forbids inline softmax normalization since each query’s kk partials are produced by kk different CTAs. The forward is therefore split into two kernels separated by HBM buffers 𝐎buf∈ℝk×n×Hq×d\mathbf{O}_{\text{buf}}\in\mathbb{R}^{k\times n\times H_{q}\times d} (locally normalized partial outputs) and LSEbuf∈ℝk×n×Hq\mathrm{LSE}_{\text{buf}}\in\mathbb{R}^{k\times n\times H_{q}} (per-partial logsumexps). The attention kernel runs the worklist above and writes each partial to its preassigned slot. The combine kernel reads the valid slots of each query, computes a=maxs⁡LSEsa=\max_{s}\mathrm{LSE}_{s} and LSE[i,h]=a+log∑sexp(LSEs−a)\mathrm{LSE}[i,h]=a+\log\sum_{s}\exp(\mathrm{LSE}_{s}-a), then forms normalized split-K weights ws=exp⁡(LSEs−LSE⁡[i,h])w_{s}=\exp(\mathrm{LSE}_{s}-\mathrm{LSE}[i,h]). It outputs 𝐎⁡[i,h]=∑sws​𝐎buf​[s,i,h]\mathbf{O}[i,h]=\sum_{s}w_{s}\,\mathbf{O}_{\text{buf}}[s,i,h] together with the final LSE⁡[i,h]\mathrm{LSE}[i,h]. The two kernels use Programmatic Dependent Launch to hide the inter-kernel launch latency.
items.zh: KV-outer 分割禁止内联 softmax 归一化，因为每个查询的 kk 个部分由 kk 个不同的 CTA 产生。因此前向传播被分割为两个内核，由 HBM 缓冲区 Obuf∈Rk×n×Hq×d\mathbf{O}_{\text{buf}}\in\mathbb{R}^{k\times n\times H_{q}\times d}（局部归一化的部分输出）和 LSEbuf∈Rk×n×Hq\mathrm{LSE}_{\text{buf}}\in\mathbb{R}^{k\times n\times H_{q}}（每个部分的 logsumexp）分隔。注意力内核执行上述工作列表并将每个部分写入其预分配的槽。合并内核读取每个查询的有效槽，计算 a=maxsLSEsa=\max_{s}\mathrm{LSE}_{s} 和 LSE[i,h]=a+log∑sexp(LSEs−a)\mathrm{LSE}[i,h]=a+\log\sum_{s}\exp(\mathrm{LSE}_{s}-a)，然后形成归一化的 split-K 权重 ws=exp(LSEs−LSE[i,h])w_{s}=\exp(\mathrm{LSE}_{s}-\mathrm{LSE}[i,h])。它输出 O[i,h]=∑swsObuf[s,i,h]\mathbf{O}[i,h]=\sum_{s}w_{s}\,\mathbf{O}_{\text{buf}}[s,i,h] 以及最终的 LSE[i,h]\mathrm{LSE}[i,h]。两个内核使用 Programmatic Dependent Launch 来隐藏内核间启动延迟。

items.en: KV-outer iteration often associates each KV tile with only a few to a few tens of query positions. Processing these positions one at a time would under-fill the score MMA: with G=16G=16, a single query position contributes only GG query heads, yielding an MMA MM dimension of only 16. Under Q-outer iteration, query positions cannot be concatenated along the sequence dimension because they generally select different KV subsets. Under KV-outer iteration, however, all gathered positions for a given tile share the same KV operands. The kernel, therefore, packs ⌈128/G⌉\lceil 128/G\rceil query positions together with their GG associated query heads, all under the same KV head, into a 128×128128\times 128 score MMA.
items.zh: KV-outer 迭代通常将每个 KV 瓦片与少量到几十个查询位置关联。逐个处理这些位置会使得 score MMA 填充不足：当 G=16G=16 时，单个查询位置仅贡献 GG 个查询头，使得 MMA 的 MM 维度仅为 16。在 Q-outer 迭代下，查询位置不能沿序列维度拼接，因为它们通常选择不同的 KV 子集。然而，在 KV-outer 迭代下，给定瓦片的所有收集位置共享相同的 KV 操作数。因此，内核将 ⌈128/G⌉\lceil 128/G\rceil 个查询位置及其关联的 GG 个查询头（均在同一个 KV 头下）打包成一个 128×128128\times 128 的 score MMA。

items.en: In our initial implementation, we utilized a dedicated kernel to compute the KL divergence forward pass, storing LSEmain\mathrm{LSE}_{\rm main} and LSEidx\mathrm{LSE}_{\rm idx} to facilitate backpropagation. However, since the KL loss only affects the backward gradient, we optimize this by emitting these LSE values directly to global memory during the main pass, allowing us to skip the KL loss forward pass entirely. Additionally, during the index branch computation, we save the per-block LSEs and perform a reduction over the top-kk blocks to obtain LSEidx\mathrm{LSE}_{\rm idx}. The backward kernel then loads these scalars directly into the softmax, eliminating the redundant forward computation.
items.zh: 在我们的初始实现中，我们使用专用内核计算 KL 散度前向传播，存储 LSEmain\mathrm{LSE}_{\rm main} 和 LSEidx\mathrm{LSE}_{\rm idx} 以支持反向传播。然而，由于 KL 损失仅影响反向梯度，我们通过在主前向传播期间将这些 LSE 值直接发射到全局内存来优化，从而完全跳过 KL 损失前向传播。此外，在索引分支计算期间，我们保存每个块的 LSE 并对 top-kk 块进行归约以获得 LSEidx\mathrm{LSE}_{\rm idx}。反向内核随后将这些标量直接加载到 softmax 中，消除了冗余的前向计算。

items.en: Per-tile work varies by orders of magnitude under variable-length sequences and data-dependent sparsity. The kernel runs as a persistent grid in which CTAs claim work through a global atomic counter; each tile is partitioned along its gathered-query dimension into sub-tiles whose count scales with the per-tile query count, subject to a minimum sub-tile granularity that amortizes per-sub-tile overhead.
items.zh: 在变长序列和数据相关稀疏性下，每个瓦片的工作量变化达数个数量级。内核作为持久化网格运行，其中 CTA 通过全局原子计数器声明工作；每个瓦片沿其收集的查询维度划分为子瓦片，其数量随每个瓦片的查询数量缩放，并受最小子瓦片粒度约束，以摊销每个子瓦片的开销。

items.en: This section reports two 109B-scale experiments used to validate the final MSA design on a native multimodal model trained on a mixture of text and image/video data. The first trains a native MSA model from scratch, which we denote as MSA-PT. The second starts from a Full-Attention checkpoint and continues pretraining after replacing dense attention with MSA, which we denote as MSA-CPT. Both models use the same architecture family as the Full-Attention baseline, but replace dense attention with the MSA layer.
items.zh: 本节报告两个 109B 规模的实验，用于验证最终 MSA 设计在文本和图像/视频数据混合训练的原生多模态模型上的效果。第一个实验从头训练原生 MSA 模型，记为 MSA-PT。第二个实验从全注意力检查点开始，将密集注意力替换为 MSA 后继续预训练，记为 MSA-CPT。两个模型使用与全注意力基线相同的架构族，但将密集注意力替换为 MSA 层。

items.en: All models use the same 41-layer MoE backbone, with approximately 109B total parameters and 6B activated parameters per token. The first three layers are dense layers, and the remaining 38 layers are MoE layers. The model uses a 200K-token vocabulary and hidden size dmodel=3072d_{\rm model}=3072. Each attention module uses MSA with 64 query heads, 4 KV heads, head dimension 128, and RoPE dimension 64. Each MoE layer uses 128 routed experts, 1 shared expert, and top-4 routed expert selection. During sparse training and evaluation, both MSA models use block size Bk=128B_{k}=128 and keep k=16k=16 key-value blocks per query and GQA group.
items.zh: 所有模型使用相同的 41 层 MoE 骨干网络，总参数约 109B，每个 token 激活参数 6B。前 3 层为密集层，其余 38 层为 MoE 层。模型使用 200K token 词汇表和隐藏大小 dmodel=3072d_{\rm model}=3072。每个注意力模块使用 MSA，包含 64 个查询头、4 个 KV 头、头维度 128 和 RoPE 维度 64。每个 MoE 层使用 128 个路由专家、1 个共享专家和 top-4 路由专家选择。在稀疏训练和评估期间，两个 MSA 模型均使用块大小 Bk=128B_{k}=128，每个查询和 GQA 组保留 k=16k=16 个键值块。

items.en: All models are trained under a total budget of 3T tokens. MSA-PT is trained from scratch: after a 40B-token indexer warmup, it remains in sparse training for the rest of pretraining. MSA-CPT starts from a GQA Full-Attention checkpoint trained on 2.6T tokens. We then replace dense attention with MSA and continue training for 400B tokens: the first 40B tokens are used for indexer warmup, followed by sparse continued pretraining.
items.zh: 所有模型在总计 3T token 的预算下训练。MSA-PT 从头训练：经过 40B token 的索引器预热后，在预训练剩余部分保持稀疏训练。MSA-CPT 从在 2.6T token 上训练的 GQA 全注意力检查点开始。然后我们将密集注意力替换为 MSA 并继续训练 400B token：前 40B token 用于索引器预热，随后进行稀疏继续预训练。

items.en: We evaluate Full, MSA-PT, and MSA-CPT on the same pretraining evaluation suite using matched checkpoints under the same training budget. For general reasoning and question answering, we use MMLU (20), MMLU-Pro (53), BBH (47), GPQA Hard (43), ARC Challenge (9), TriviaQA (24), and WinoGrande (44). For math and code, we use GSM8K (10), MGSM (45), MathVista (32), OlymMATH (46), HumanEval (7), EvalPlus (29), BigCodeBench (71), and MultiPL-E MBPP (6). We also evaluate multimodal capability: image benchmarks include AI2D (26), ChartQA (34), MMMU (64), OCRBench v2 (17), CharXiv (54), VisualWebBench (30), and CVBench (51), while video benchmarks include EgoSchema (33), LongVideoBench (55), MLVU (70), MMVU (68), VideoMME (16), and TemporalBench (5). For long-context evaluation, we use RULER (21) and HELMET (62). We additionally report perplexity on downstream agent tasks, including τ2\tau^{2}-bench (3), TheAgentCompany (59), Humanity’s Last Exam (41), and SWE-bench (23).
items.zh: 我们在相同的预训练评估套件上评估 Full、MSA-PT 和 MSA-CPT，使用相同训练预算下的匹配检查点。对于通用推理和问答，我们使用 MMLU (20)、MMLU-Pro (53)、BBH (47)、GPQA Hard (43)、ARC Challenge (9)、TriviaQA (24) 和 WinoGrande (44)。对于数学和代码，我们使用 GSM8K (10)、MGSM (45)、MathVista (32)、OlymMATH (46)、HumanEval (7)、EvalPlus (29)、BigCodeBench (71) 和 MultiPL-E MBPP (6)。我们还评估多模态能力：图像基准包括 AI2D (26)、ChartQA (34)、MMMU (64)、OCRBench v2 (17)、CharXiv (54)、VisualWebBench (30) 和 CVBench (51)，视频基准包括 EgoSchema (33)、LongVideoBench (55)、MLVU (70)、MMVU (68)、VideoMME (16) 和 TemporalBench (5)。对于长上下文评估，我们使用 RULER (21) 和 HELMET (62)。我们还报告了下游智能体任务的困惑度，包括 τ2\tau^{2}-bench (3)、TheAgentCompany (59)、Humanity’s Last Exam (41) 和 SWE-bench (23)。

items.en: To evaluate whether MSA remains effective after long-context scaling, we conduct an additional extension experiment on the MSA-CPT model. Starting from the sparse continued-pretraining checkpoint, we run approximately 140B tokens of long-context training and then evaluate on HELMET and RULER. The results are reported in Table 3. After the extension stage, MSA-CPT remains close to the Full-Attention baseline. Since each query and GQA group still attends to only k​Bk=16×128=2,048kB_{k}=16\times 128=2{,}048 key-value tokens, these results indicate that MSA can preserve long-context capability under a highly tight attention budget.
items.zh: 为了评估 MSA 在长上下文缩放后是否仍然有效，我们在 MSA-CPT 模型上进行了额外的扩展实验。从稀疏继续预训练检查点开始，我们运行约 140B token 的长上下文训练，然后在 HELMET 和 RULER 上评估。结果报告在表 3 中。扩展阶段后，MSA-CPT 仍接近全注意力基线。由于每个查询和 GQA 组仍然只关注 k Bk=16×128=2,048kB_{k}=16\times 128=2{,}048 个键值 token，这些结果表明 MSA 可以在高度紧张的注意力预算下保持长上下文能力。

items.en: Additional ablations supporting these design choices are provided in the appendix. In particular, Section B studies the training recipe for the Index Branch, including gradient sources, KL-gradient detachment, warmup, and the comparison with a sliding-window sparse baseline. Section C further examines architectural choices such as block size, forced sink, local selection, and the Index Branch value head. These ablations provide the empirical basis for the final MSA design used in the main experiments.
items.zh: 支持这些设计选择的额外消融实验在附录中提供。特别是，第 B 节研究了索引分支的训练方案，包括梯度来源、KL 梯度分离、预热以及与滑动窗口稀疏基线的比较。第 C 节进一步考察了架构选择，如块大小、强制 sink、局部选择和索引分支值头。这些消融实验为主实验中使用的最终 MSA 设计提供了经验基础。

items.en: We instantiate the complexity analysis in Section 3.3 on our experimental model configuration and report both theoretical attention-FLOPs reduction and measured runtime speedup. Dense GQA and MSA use the same query head count, key-value head count, head dimension, and context length; the only difference is that dense GQA attends to the full context, whereas MSA performs index selection followed by sparse attention over a fixed KV budget. In our setting, MSA uses Bk=128B_{k}=128 and k=16k=16, corresponding to a selected budget of k​Bk=2,048kB_{k}=2{,}048 tokens per query.
items.zh: 我们在实验模型配置上实例化了第 3.3 节的复杂度分析，并报告了理论注意力 FLOPs 减少和实测运行时加速。密集 GQA 和 MSA 使用相同的查询头数、键值头数、头维度和上下文长度；唯一的区别是密集 GQA 关注完整上下文，而 MSA 执行索引选择后对固定 KV 预算进行稀疏注意力。在我们的设置中，MSA 使用 Bk=128B_{k}=128 和 k=16k=16，对应每个查询选择的预算为 k Bk=2,048kB_{k}=2{,}048 个 token。

items.en: As shown in Figure 4, MSA reduces per-token attention FLOPs substantially relative to GQA in our setting, with the reduction increasing at longer contexts. At 1​M1\mathrm{M} tokens, the FLOPs reduction reaches 28.4×28.4\times under the same head configuration. The measured runtime speedup follows the same scaling trend but is not expected to match the FLOPs reduction exactly. Sparse attention introduces index construction, top-kk selection, reverse-index materialization, query gathering, and load-balancing overheads, and its memory access pattern is less regular than dense attention. Therefore, the runtime speedup is smaller than the theoretical FLOPs reduction, but it increases with context length as the dense baseline continues to scale with the full sequence while MSA keeps the main attention budget fixed.
items.zh: 如图 4 所示，在我们的设置中，MSA 相对于 GQA 显著减少了每个 token 的注意力 FLOPs，且减少幅度随上下文长度增加而增大。在 1M1\mathrm{M} token 时，相同头配置下的 FLOPs 减少达到 28.4×28.4\times。实测运行时加速遵循相同的缩放趋势，但预计不会完全匹配 FLOPs 减少。稀疏注意力引入了索引构建、top-kk 选择、反向索引物化、查询收集和负载均衡开销，其内存访问模式不如密集注意力规则。因此，运行时加速小于理论 FLOPs 减少，但随着上下文长度增加而增大，因为密集基线随完整序列缩放，而 MSA 保持主要注意力预算固定。

items.en: Long-context efficiency has motivated a large body of work on efficient attention, which can be broadly grouped into two directions: replacing dense softmax attention with cheaper linear or recurrent alternatives, and retaining softmax attention while restricting its receptive field. Linear attention (25; 8) replaces the softmax kernel with a linear-complexity surrogate, while state-space models such as Mamba (19) replace attention with a selective recurrence over hidden states. Hybrid stacks (36; 37) interleave linear blocks with full-attention blocks, reducing the number of quadratic layers while preserving part of the exact-softmax capacity. Fixed-pattern attention keeps softmax attention but imposes a predefined support, including local windows, global tokens (4; 65), and attention sinks with a sliding window (58). These approaches reduce long-context cost either by replacing dense attention in part or in full, or by using a content-agnostic attention pattern.
items.zh: 长上下文效率激发了大量关于高效注意力的工作，大致可分为两个方向：用更便宜的线性或循环替代方案替换密集 softmax 注意力，以及保留 softmax 注意力同时限制其感受野。线性注意力 (25; 8) 用线性复杂度的替代函数替换 softmax 核，而状态空间模型如 Mamba (19) 用隐藏状态上的选择性循环替换注意力。混合堆叠 (36; 37) 将线性块与全注意力块交错，减少二次层的数量同时保留部分精确 softmax 能力。固定模式注意力保留 softmax 注意力但施加预定义支持，包括局部窗口、全局 token (4; 65) 以及带滑动窗口的注意力 sink (58)。这些方法通过部分或完全替换密集注意力，或使用与内容无关的注意力模式来降低长上下文成本。

items.en: Beyond fixed sparse patterns, adaptive sparse attention makes the attended support depend on the input. Existing methods differ mainly in when this support is constructed and whether the selector is trained as part of the model. Inference-time sparsification operates on a pretrained Full-Attention backbone and constructs sparse supports only during serving. H2O (66) and SnapKV (28) prune the KV cache during decoding using accumulated attention statistics, Quest (48) performs page-level importance estimation per query, MInference (22) and FlexPrefill (27) dispatch per-head sparse kernels at prefill, and InfLLM (56) maintains attention sinks, a local context window, and retrievable chunks. These methods inherit the training cost of Full Attention and leave at least one inference phase near Full-Attention speed. Natively trained sparse-attention designs train the indexer during pretraining and form the closest prior work to MSA. NSA (63) targets MQA/MHA backbones with three parallel branches: compressed attention for coarse global context, selected attention over fine-grained blocks, and a sliding window for local context. InfLLM-V2 (67) achieves zero-shot dense-to-sparse switching by unifying parameter-free block selection with a local sliding window. MoBA (31) also operates on GQA but uses very large KV blocks scored by block-averaged keys, and trains its indexer only through the language-modeling gradient. DSA (14) sits on top of MLA in its MQA mode: a multi-head ReLU-based lightning indexer scores tokens individually, all query heads share a single Top-kk index, and selection is token-level. MSA differs from this neighborhood along two axes that are taken up together: per-GQA-group Top-kk sharing combined with block-level selection, which gives multi-group block-granular retrieval while keeping KV reads contiguous.
items.zh: 超越固定的稀疏模式，自适应稀疏注意力使得被关注的支持集依赖于输入。现有方法的主要区别在于该支持集何时构建以及选择器是否作为模型的一部分进行训练。推理时稀疏化在预训练的全注意力骨干网络上运行，仅在服务期间构建稀疏支持集。H2O (66) 和 SnapKV (28) 在解码过程中使用累积的注意力统计信息修剪 KV 缓存，Quest (48) 对每个查询执行页面级重要性估计，MInference (22) 和 FlexPrefill (27) 在预填充阶段为每个头分配稀疏内核，InfLLM (56) 维护注意力汇聚点、局部上下文窗口和可检索的块。这些方法继承了全注意力的训练成本，并且至少有一个推理阶段接近全注意力速度。原生训练的稀疏注意力设计在预训练期间训练索引器，构成了与 MSA 最接近的先前工作。NSA (63) 针对 MQA/MHA 骨干网络，采用三个并行分支：用于粗略全局上下文的压缩注意力、细粒度块上的选择性注意力以及用于局部上下文的滑动窗口。InfLLM-V2 (67) 通过将无参数块选择与局部滑动窗口统一，实现了零样本的密集到稀疏切换。MoBA (31) 也基于 GQA 运行，但使用非常大的 KV 块，通过块平均键进行评分，并仅通过语言建模梯度训练其索引器。DSA (14) 在其 MQA 模式下位于 MLA 之上：一个多头 ReLU 闪电索引器逐个标记评分，所有查询头共享单个 Top-k 索引，并且选择是标记级的。MSA 与这些方法在两个维度上有所不同，这两个维度被同时采用：每个 GQA 组共享 Top-k 与块级选择相结合，这提供了多组块粒度检索，同时保持 KV 读取连续。

items.en: Efficient kernels are essential for sparse attention to translate theoretical FLOP reduction into wall-clock speedups. FlashAttention (11) and FlashAttention-2 (13) introduced IO-aware tiled softmax attention, and FlashDecoding (12) extended this to memory-bound decoding. Open-source block-sparse kernels such as Flash-Sparse-Attention (60) and FlashMoBA (57) have made block-sparse variants of this recurrence available. MSA’s kernel, described in section 4, reuses the FlashAttention algorithmic skeleton with a loop ordering tuned to the GQA-native, block-granular access pattern MSA produces.
items.zh: 高效的内核对于稀疏注意力将理论上的 FLOP 减少转化为实际加速至关重要。FlashAttention (11) 和 FlashAttention-2 (13) 引入了 IO 感知的分块 softmax 注意力，FlashDecoding (12) 将其扩展到内存受限的解码。开源块稀疏内核，如 Flash-Sparse-Attention (60) 和 FlashMoBA (57)，使得这种递归的块稀疏变体可用。MSA 的内核（在第 4 节中描述）重用了 FlashAttention 的算法框架，其循环顺序针对 MSA 产生的 GQA 原生、块粒度访问模式进行了调整。

items.en: We introduced MSA, a sparse-attention mechanism co-designed with Grouped-Query Attention. The architecture attaches a lightweight Index Branch to a standard GQA layer: each GQA group independently selects a small set of key-value blocks through a block-level dot-product indexer, and the Main Branch performs softmax attention restricted to the selected blocks. The Index Branch is a pure selector and is trained by a KL alignment loss against the Main Branch under a two-stage warmup schedule and a stop-gradient on the index input that confines the auxiliary loss to the index projections. At the 109B-MoE scale, MSA preserves the capability of a GQA Full-Attention baseline across most pretraining and agentic benchmarks while reducing per-token attention compute by 28.4×28.4\times at 1​M1\mathrm{M} context, the regime in which long-context inference becomes the binding deployment constraint.
items.zh: 我们引入了 MSA，一种与分组查询注意力协同设计的稀疏注意力机制。该架构将一个轻量级索引分支附加到标准 GQA 层：每个 GQA 组通过块级点积索引器独立选择一小部分键值块，主分支则对所选块执行受限的 softmax 注意力。索引分支是纯选择器，通过两阶段预热调度和索引输入上的停止梯度（将辅助损失限制在索引投影上）下的 KL 对齐损失进行训练。在 109B-MoE 规模下，MSA 在大多数预训练和智能体基准测试中保持了 GQA 全注意力基线的能力，同时在 1M 上下文（长上下文推理成为部署约束的关键场景）下将每个标记的注意力计算减少了 28.4 倍。

items.en: Outlook. MSA’s core decisions—per-GQA-group independent selection, block-level granularity, and an indexer trained with a KL alignment objective—compose with the GQA backbone shared by most current open-source frontier models, so the recipe should transfer with little modification. Two directions are natural next steps: closing the residual long-context retrieval gap, either through longer sparse training, a larger selection budget at inference time, or a richer indexer scoring function; and extending the same selector-only design to settings beyond pretraining, including reinforcement-learning post-training and agentic deployment, where long-context cost is the dominant operational constraint.
items.zh: 展望。MSA 的核心决策——每个 GQA 组独立选择、块级粒度以及使用 KL 对齐目标训练的索引器——与当前大多数开源前沿模型共享的 GQA 骨干网络兼容，因此该方案应能直接迁移，只需少量修改。两个自然的发展方向是：缩小剩余的长上下文检索差距，可以通过更长的稀疏训练、推理时更大的选择预算或更丰富的索引器评分函数来实现；以及将相同的纯选择器设计扩展到预训练之外的场景，包括强化学习后训练和智能体部署，其中长上下文成本是主要的操作约束。
